program.title: FullStackX: The 6-Week Accelerator
program.overview: An immersive six-week program for beginners to learn software development in an AI-enhanced workflow, from prompt-led creation to structured engineering and deployment.

curriculum.summary: Branching, pull requests, code reviews, and collaborative version control fundamentals.

outcomes: Apply an AI-first engineering mindset across ideation, coding, review, and deployment.

inquiryRequest.message: I want to enroll in the upcoming FullStackX cohort.

inquirySuccessResponse.message: Inquiry received. Coordinators will contact you soon.

inquiryDuplicateResponse.message: A similar inquiry was submitted recently. We will follow up shortly.
